title: glechoma leucostegia
intro: Glechoma leucostegia, also known as Russian melissa or creeping Melissa, is a type of perennial herb that belongs to the mint family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Glechoma leucostegia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Glechoma leucostegia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to calm the nervous system and promote a restful sleep.
